hooks.command: [ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Direct edits to main are not allowed. Create a feature branch."}' >&2; exit 2; }

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; f=json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''); print(f)" | grep -qE '\.(m|h)$' && clang-format --style=file -i "$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))")" 2>/dev/null || true
